name: Egg Fu Yung
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Barbecued meat of your choice (e.g., pork, chicken, beef, or ham)
1 cup Chicken or beef soup stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except eggs in a large bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and blend together until well combined.
3. Heat enough oil in a large skillet to cover the bottom.
4. Form patties using approximately 1/3 cup of the mixture. Fry the patties on both sides until brown, turning only once.
5. In a small saucepan, heat the soup stock for the gravy. Add the remaining sauce ingredients and cook until thick and bubbly, stirring constantly.
6. Pour the gravy over the fried patties and serve hot.
